title: GLUTA PRO - Glutamine
description: Gluta PRO is a high-quality micronized L-glutamine powder formulated for athletes, recreational users and anyone looking to improve recovery, immune function and muscle endurance. Glutamine is the most abundant amino acid in muscle tissue and is crucial for regeneration processes, reducing inflammation and maintaining healthy gut and immune system function. During intense training, the level of glutamine in the body decreases, which can lead to slow recovery and a decrease in immunity. Gluta PRO compensates for these losses and helps the body to respond more quickly to effort, whether you train strength sports, endurance or interval activities. The product is formulated to meet the needs of both top athletes and recreational players who want faster results and less fatigue. Benefits of using Glutamine: Regular use of Gluta PRO increases the body's ability to recover after strenuous training, reduces muscle breakdown and protects immunity during periods of great physical stress. Glutamine affects the nitrogen balance in the muscles, accelerates protein synthesis and helps reduce inflammation and pain. It also contributes to the health of the digestive system, which is crucial for nutrient absorption and a stable immune response. When is it used? Gluta PRO is used after intense training to accelerate regeneration and reduce muscle catabolism. It is ideal in phases of increased load, preparation for competition, as well as for anyone who has a high training volume. It is also useful in periods of decreased immunity, after illness, surgery or long-term fatigue. It can also be used in fat reduction phases, as it helps preserve muscle mass while the body is in a caloric deficit. How is it used? • Recommended daily dose: 5-10 g of L-glutamine • How to take: mix with water, juice, BCAA drink or post-workout shake • Optimal time: immediately after training; if necessary and one portion before bedtime • Maximum recommended dose: up to 20 g per day for advanced athletes • Can be used daily, even on non-training days, to support immunity and recovery Composition: L-glutamine Nutritional values ​​Nutritional information Per portion (2 scoops) L-Glutamine 5g 11.2022.

title: OMEGA 3 PRO Soft Gel
description: 1. Skipjack tuna (Katsuwonus pelamis) Skipjack tuna is a smaller type of tuna that is often used as a source of Omega-3 due to its rich concentration of EPA and DHA. This fish is known for its high quality protein and Omega-3 fatty acids, which makes it safer for daily consumption. Omega-3 from skipjack tuna: Supports heart health : Lowers blood triglyceride levels and improves circulation. Reduces inflammation: It has an anti-inflammatory effect, helping to reduce the symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Improves cognitive functions: Helps preserve brain health and memory, and reduces the risk of neurodegenerative diseases. 2. Peruvian anchovy (Engraulis ringens) Peruvian anchovy is one of the richest sources of Omega-3 fatty acids, and the fish used to produce Omega-3 are small, which means they have a lower risk of accumulating harmful chemicals. Due to its rich content of EPA and DHA, the Peruvian anchovy is excellent for: Increasing mental sharpness : Omega-3 from anchovies helps maintain concentration, reduce symptoms of depression and anxiety. Support for heart health: Omega-3 from anchovies reduces the risk of heart disease and supports optimal blood vessel function. Anti-inflammatory properties: Anchovies help reduce inflammatory processes in the body, which is useful for recovery from injuries and reducing symptoms of chronic diseases such as arthritis. 3. European anchovy (Engraulis encrasicolus) The European anchovy is very similar to the Peruvian anchovy, but is specific to European waters. It is also rich in Omega-3 fatty acids EPA and DHA, and the main benefits include: Improving eye health : DHA, which is present in anchovies, is a key ingredient for retinal health, reducing the risk of macular degeneration. Reducing stress and anxiety : Omega-3 fatty acids from European anchovies can help reduce stress and anxiety, as well as improve mood. Skin support : Omega-3 from anchovies helps hydrate the skin and reduce inflammation associated with skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis. Taking an Omega-3 supplement regularly can provide numerous health benefits. Some of the main benefits include: Heart and blood vessel health: Omega-3 fatty acids help lower bad cholesterol (LDL) and triglyceride levels, thereby reducing the risk of heart disease, heart attack and stroke. Mental health : Omega-3 helps reduce symptoms of depression, anxiety and stress, as well as improve general mental well-being. Brain health : DHA from Omega-3 is crucial for brain and nervous system health, improving memory and concentration, as well as reducing the risk of dementia and Alzheimer's disease. Anti-inflammatory properties: Omega-3 reduces inflammation in the body, which can help reduce arthritis pain and prevent other inflammatory diseases. Eye health : Omega-3 is crucial for eye health, preventing macular degeneration and improving visual function. Skin health: Omega-3 helps maintain healthy and hydrated skin, reduces inflammation associated with skin diseases.

title: PRO BAR Layered 40g
description:
PRO BAR Layered is a next-generation protein chocolate bar. Each 40g bar features distinct flavour layers — crispy, chewy, and chocolate-coated — delivering 15g of protein in a treat that actually tastes like a chocolate bar.

Available in four indulgent flavours: Chocolate Caramel with Vanilla Layer, Dark Chocolate with Cherry Layer, Dark Chocolate with Orange Layer, and White Chocolate with Forest Fruit Layer. No guilt, just gains.

variants.name: White Chocolate with Forest Fruit Layer

title: Women's Training Gloves
description:
Basic Women Gloves are designed for comfort and grip during weightlifting, machine training, and bodyweight exercises. The neoprene palm provides cushioning without bulk, while the open-back design keeps your hands cool.

Available in XS, S, and M. Ideal for gym-goers who want palm protection without compromising feel for the bar or equipment.
